news.t: Baron Capital Adds Risk-Optimized Large-Cap ETF to Lineup
Baron Capital rolls out five active ETFs, SpaceX becomes the firm's biggest investment
Baron Capital Launches Active ETFs, Building Upon Investment Legacy in Active Management

holdings.infoBox: BCGD is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 8.04%, NVIDIA at 6.76%, Amazon.com at 6.32%, Alphabet at 5.64%, and Visa Inc. at 5.04%.

overview.description: The Baron Global Durable Advantage ETF (BCGD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in large-cap stocks worldwide. Stock selection focuses on companies advancing through the later phases of their growth S-curves. BCGD was launched on Dec 15, 2025 and is issued by Baron.

data.title: Ron & Michael Baron on Baron Capital's ETF launch
data.text: Mutual fund and long-term investing heavyweight Baron Capital is launching a suite of actively-managed ETFs. Plus, what Ron & Michael think is next for one of their biggest names: SpaceX
